docs.title: Welcome to MkDocs
docs.text: For full documentation visit mkdocs.org.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: API Documentation - Online Book Management
docs.text: Sistem ini menyediakan API untuk mengelola kategori dan buku (PDF) dengan otentikasi menggunakan Laravel Sanctum.

docs.title: Base URL
docs.text: http://127.0.0.1:8000/api (Sesuaikan dengan port server lokal Anda)

docs.title: 1. Register
docs.text:
Mendaftarkan user baru untuk mendapatkan akses API.

  • Method: POST
  • URL: /register
  • Headers:
    • Accept: application/json
  • Body: 
    {
    "name": "User Name",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "password": "password",
    "password_confirmation": "password"
}
  • Response: 200 OK (Berisi access_token)

docs.title: 2. Login
docs.text:
Masuk ke sistem untuk mendapatkan access token.

  • Method: POST
  • URL: /login
  • Headers:
    • Accept: application/json
  • Body: 
    {
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "password": "password"
}
  • Response: 200 OK (Berisi access_token)

docs.title: Category Management
docs.text: Endpoint ini digunakan untuk mengelola kategori buku. Semua endpoint di bawah ini membutuhkan header: Authorization: Bearer {your_token}

docs.title: 1. List Categories
docs.text: Menampilkan semua kategori. - Method: GET - URL: /categories

docs.title: 2. Store Category
docs.text:
• Method: POST
  • URL: /categories
  • Body: 
    {
    "name": "Programming"
}

docs.title: 3. Update Category
docs.text:
• Method: PUT/PATCH
  • URL: /categories/{id}
  • Body: 
    {
    "name": "Advanced Programming"
}

docs.title: 4. Delete Category
docs.text:
• Method: DELETE
  • URL: /categories/{id}

docs.title: Book Management
docs.text: Semua endpoint di bawah ini membutuhkan header: Authorization: Bearer {your_token}

docs.title: 1. List Books (with Search, Filter, & Pagination)
docs.text:
• Method: GET
  • URL: /books
  • Query Params:
    • search: Cari berdasarkan judul atau penulis (e.g., ?search=Laravel)
    • category_id: Filter berdasarkan ID kategori (e.g., ?category_id=1)
    • page: Nomor halaman (Pagination 5 data per halaman)
  • Response Example: 
    {
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 1,
            "category_id": 1,
            "title": "Mastering Laravel",
            "author": "John Doe",
            "description": "Learn Laravel in 30 days.",
            "pdf_url": "https://example.com/books/laravel.pdf",
            "price": 50.0,
            "created_at": "...",
            "updated_at": "..."
        }
    ],
    "links": { ... },
    "meta": { ... }
}

docs.title: 2. Store Book
docs.text:
• Method: POST
  • URL: /books
  • Body: 
    {
    "title": "Eloquent ORM Deep Dive",
    "category_id": 1,
    "author": "Jane Doe",
    "description": "Comprehensive guide to Eloquent.",
    "price": 45.0,
    "pdf_url": "https://example.com/books/eloquent.pdf"
}

docs.title: 3. Show Book Detail
docs.text:
• Method: GET
  • URL: /books/{id}

docs.title: 4. Update Book
docs.text:
• Method: PUT/PATCH
  • URL: /books/{id}
  • Body: (Semua field bersifat opsional) 
    {
    "title": "Eloquent ORM Deep Dive v2",
    "price": 49.99
}

docs.title: 5. Delete Book
docs.text:
• Method: DELETE
  • URL: /books/{id}

docs.title: Standard Response Format
docs.text: Semua response data menggunakan JsonResource untuk standarisasi: - Data utama dibungkus dalam key "data". - Untuk endpoint list buku, terdapat key "links" dan "meta" untuk informasi pagination. - Header Accept: application/json wajib digunakan untuk mendapatkan response error validasi dalam format JSON.

docs.title: 1. Authentication
docs.text: THIS IS JUST AN EXAMPLE ON HOW TO ACTUALLY USE IT YOU CAN SIMPLY READ API.md for detailed instruction.

docs.title: Register
docs.text:
HEADERS: - Key :Accept - Value :application/json

Method:POST URL:http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/register EXAMPLE OF BODY: 

{
    "name": "bazzite",
    "email": "bazzite@gg.com",
    "password": "bazzite.gg",
    "password_confirmation": "bazzite.gg"
}
RESPONSE: 
{
    "access_token": "1|vVCLpytUJgMSRMiW2zt0AA1qRvftA3DRTqNiMkXAb948770e",
    "token_type": "Bearer",
    "user": {
        "name": "bazzite",
        "email": "bazzite@gg.com",
        "updated_at": "2026-04-17T04:58:22.000000Z",
        "created_at": "2026-04-17T04:58:22.000000Z",
        "id": 1
    }
}

docs.title: 2. Login
docs.text:
METHOD:POST URL:http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/login BODY: 

{
    "email": "bazzite@gg.com",
    "password": "bazzite.gg"
}

RESPONSE: 

{
    "access_token": "2|46svRT1s6HN5XW2kd74No4kiW6Sot4xi5fhSjH3193ba7d98",
    "token_type": "Bearer",
    "user": {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "bazzite",
        "email": "bazzite@gg.com",
        "email_verified_at": null,
        "created_at": "2026-04-17T04:58:22.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2026-04-17T04:58:22.000000Z"
    }
}

docs.title: 1. List Categories
docs.text:
• Method: GET
  • URL:http://localhost:8080/api/categories
  • Headers: Key:Accept Accept: application/json Authorization: Bearer 
2|46svRT1s6HN5XW2kd74No4kiW6Sot4xi5fhSjH3193ba7d98
  • RESPONSE: 
    {

        {

}

docs.title: 2. Store Category
docs.text:
• Method: POST
  • URL: http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/categories
  • Body: 
    {
    "name": "Programming"
}
  • RESPONSE: 
    {
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Machine Learning",
        "created_at": "2026-04-17T06:23:22.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2026-04-17T06:23:22.000000Z"
    }
}

docs.title: 3. Update Category
docs.text:
• Method: PUT/PATCH
  • URL: /categories/{id}
  • Body: 
    {
    "name": "Advanced Machine Learning"
}
  • RESPONSE: 
    {
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Advanced Machine Learning",
        "created_at": "2026-04-17T06:23:22.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2026-04-17T06:26:58.000000Z"
    }
}

docs.title: 4. Delete Category
docs.text:
• Method: DELETE
  • URL: http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/categories/1
  • RESPONSE: 
    {
    "message": "Category deleted successfully"
}

docs.title: Book Management
docs.text: Semua endpoint di bawah ini membutuhkan header: Authorization: Bearer {your_token}

docs.title: 1. Store Book
docs.text:
• Method: POST
  • URL: /books
  • Body: 
    {
    "title": "Machine Learning Lanjut",
    "category_id": 2,
    "author": "Nobel",
    "description": "Comprehensive guide to Machine Learning.",
    "price": 90.0,
    "pdf_url": "https://example.com/books/MachineLearningLanjut.pdf"
}
  • RESPONSE:

        "id": 1,
        "category_id": 2,
        "category": {
            "id": 2,
            "name": "Advanced Machine Learning",
            "created_at": "2026-04-17T06:41:32.000000Z",
            "updated_at": "2026-04-17T06:41:32.000000Z"
        },
        "title": "Machine Learning Lanjut",
        "author": "Nobel",
        "description": "Comprehensive guide to Machine Learning.",
        "pdf_url": "https://example.com/books/MachineLearningLanjut.pdf",
        "price": 90,
        "created_at": "2026-04-17T06:50:43.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2026-04-17T06:50:43.000000Z"
    }
}

docs.title: 2. Show Book Detail
docs.text:
• Method: GET
  • URL: /books/{id}

docs.title: 3. Update Book

    "price": 100.0
}
  • RESPONSE:

            "id": 2,
            "name": "Advanced Machine Learning",
            "created_at": "2026-04-17T06:41:32.000000Z",

        "title": "Machine Learning Lanjut",
        "author": "Irham Nobel",

docs.title: 4. Delete Book
docs.text:
• Method: DELETE
  • URL: /books/{id}
  • RESPONSE: 
    {
    "message": "Book deleted successfully"

docs.title: 5. List Books (with Search, Filter, & Pagination)
docs.text:
• Method: GET
  • URL: /books

  • Query Params:

    • search: Cari berdasarkan judul atau penulis (e.g., ?search=Laravel)
    • category_id: Filter berdasarkan ID kategori (e.g., ?category_id=1)
    • page: Nomor halaman (Pagination 5 data per halaman)

  • EXAMPLE: 

    http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/books/?search=Programming

  • Response Example: 

    {
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 3,
            "category_id": 3,
            "category": {
                "id": 3,
                "name": "Programming",
                "created_at": "2026-04-17T06:42:00.000000Z",
                "updated_at": "2026-04-17T06:42:00.000000Z"
            },
            "title": "Programming Lanjut",
            "author": "Nobel",
            "description": "Comprehensive guide to Programming.",
            "pdf_url": "https://example.com/books/ProgrammingLanjut.pdf",
            "price": 90,
            "created_at": "2026-04-17T07:03:34.000000Z",
            "updated_at": "2026-04-17T07:05:10.000000Z"
        }
    ],
    "links": {
        "first": "http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/books?page=1",
        "last": "http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/books?page=1",
        "prev": null,
        "next": null
    },
    "meta": {
        "current_page": 1,
        "from": 1,
        "last_page": 1,
        "links": [
            {
                "url": null,
                "label": "« Previous",
                "page": null,
                "active": false
            },
            {
                "url": "http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/books?page=1",
                "label": "1",
                "page": 1,
                "active": true
            },
            {
                "url": null,
                "label": "Next »",
                "page": null,
                "active": false
            }
        ],
        "path": "http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/books",
        "per_page": 5,
        "to": 1,
        "total": 1
    }
}
